name: CM_PICKER_ROLLER
description: Vertical roller picker component (iOS-style picker wheel). Shows 3 items with center selection. Supports infinite wrapping, smooth scroll animations. Used in clock setting and value selection. Divider lines mark selection area.
visualForm: 3-slot vertical picker with dividers (68px items), center item selected, smooth scrolling with wrapping
descriptionKo: 3개 항목이 중앙 선택 방식으로 표시되는 세로 롤러 피커(iOS 스타일 피커 휠)입니다. 무한 감기와 부드러운 스크롤 애니메이션을 지원하며, 시계 설정이나 값 선택에 활용됩니다.
descriptionEn: Vertical roller picker component (iOS-style picker wheel). Shows 3 items with center selection. Supports infinite wrapping, smooth scroll animations. Used in clock setting and value selection. Divider lines mark selection area.
